target.title: fix(ui): prevent false busy state in Control UI webchat after response completion
target.body:
## Summary

Fixes #87387: Control UI webchat would continue showing a false "In progress" status and "Stop" button after the assistant response had completed, due to relying on stale `sessionsResult` abortable state instead of actual active stream/sending state.

## Changes

- Modified `ui/src/ui/views/chat.ts`:
  - Updated `composerRunStatus` to require `isBusy` (sending || stream !== null) in addition to `showAbortableUi` before forcing "in-progress" phase
  - Updated `renderChatQueue` `canAbort` prop to include `isBusy` check
  - Updated `renderChatRunControls` `canAbort` prop to include `isBusy` check

Now the bottom status badge and Stop button only show active/busy state when there is an authoritative local send/stream/run in progress, not when the session list state is stale.

## Real behavior proof

- Behavior addressed: Control UI webchat no longer shows false "In progress" badge or "Stop" button after response completion; busy state now tied to actual sending/stream activity.
- Real environment tested: Local OpenClaw 2026.5.26 checkout, Node.js v22.22.0, Control UI built with Vite, Chrome on Windows 11 (WSL2/Linux gateway).
- Exact steps or command run after this patch:
  1. Built Control UI with Vite
  2. Started OpenClaw gateway locally
  3. Opened Control UI at http://127.0.0.1:18789
  4. Sent a message that triggers agent response
  5. Observed UI badge and button during streaming
  6. Observed UI badge and button after completion
- Evidence after fix:

```text
$ cd ui && npx vite build
vite v8.0.14 building client environment for production...
[ times ]
✓ built in 4.21s

$ npx vitest run src/ui/views/chat.test.ts
 RUN  v4.1.7 /home/.../ui
 ✓ |unit| src/ui/views/chat.test.ts (58 tests) 1909ms
 Test Files  1 passed (1)
      Tests  58 passed (58)

$ npx vitest run src/ui/chat/run-controls.test.ts
 RUN  v4.1.7 /home/.../ui
 ✓ |unit| src/ui/chat/run-controls.test.ts (8 tests) 222ms
 Test Files  1 passed (1)
      Tests  8 passed (8)
```

- Observed result after fix:
  - During active streaming: "In progress" badge with loader icon, composer shows "Stop" button
  - After completion: Badge returns to idle/completed state, composer button shows "Send"
  - No sticky busy state after backend confirms completion
  - Queue controls only show abort/steer while actively sending/streaming
- What was not tested:
  - Long-running tool-heavy responses (>30s) in production
  - WebSocket reconnect scenarios
  - Mobile browsers
  - Safari/Firefox

## Verification Steps

1. Run OpenClaw with Control UI
2. Send a message and wait for completion
3. Observe that after completion, the status badge returns to idle and the composer button shows "Send" instead of "Stop"
4. Verify that during active streaming/sending, the badge shows "In progress" and Stop button appears

## AI Assistance

This PR was created with AI assistance (iCodemate). The fix was derived from the issue's suggested local patch and implemented with minimal changes to ensure correctness and maintainability.
